instruction: Create a PDF at ~/Documents/out.pdf whose text contains the phrase {PHRASE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 PDF fidelity); pdf_contains tolerates the reflowed whitespace of a PDF export, the macOS analogue of OSWorld docs/pdf text checks

args: mkdir -p "$HOME/Documents"; printf 'placeholder body\n' > "$HOME/Documents/src.txt"; cupsfilter "$HOME/Documents/src.txt" > "$HOME/Documents/out.pdf" 2>/dev/null || textutil -convert pdf "$HOME/Documents/src.txt" -output "$HOME/Documents/out.pdf" 2>/dev/null || true
